positive: Stylized, abstract bioluminescent forest scene, viewed from a deep central forest clearing. The primary subject is a winding river reflecting glowing flora and fauna (mushrooms, lilies). The color palette is dominated by deep teals, electric magentas, sapphire blues, and lime greens, creating a high-contrast, ethereal glow. The composition should feature strong vertical elements (trunks, glowing vines) framing a central horizontal flow (the river). Flat vector elements mixed with hyper-detailed, soft glow effects. Clean, impactful silhouettes against a dark background. Suitable for all ages, whimsical, fantasy art. Minimalist depth of field, centered composition, symmetrical balance. Digital illustration, tattoo style, vibrant, dramatic backlighting, perfect for t-shirts and apparel.
negative: text, signature, watermark, logo, blurry, out of focus, abstract noise, artifacts, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, clutter, cartoonish, photorealistic, ugly, distorted
